title: Cramer: Why all the money flowing to AI stocks is a problem — and how it can be fixed
summary: Cramer examines how excessive capital flowing into AI and data center-related stocks creates market imbalances while other sectors like pharma are neglected. The article proposes solutions to address this concentrated investment pattern.
content: Just as anything peripherally involved with the data center is blessed, anything even tangentially associated with pharma is a nightmare.

zh.title: 克莱默：流向AI股票的所有资金为什么是个问题——以及如何解决
zh.summary: 克莱默研究了过度资本流向AI和数据中心相关股票如何造成市场失衡，同时制药等其他部门被忽视。该文章提出了解决这种集中投资模式的解决方案。

title: Trump presses his case for White House ballroom following press dinner shooting
summary: Trump uses social media to reiterate his claim that the White House ballroom is a matter of national security following a press dinner shooting incident. The statement reflects ongoing political discourse about the incident.
content: The President took to social media to reiterate his case that White House ballroom is a matter of national security in the wake of the press dinner shooting.

zh.title: 特朗普在新闻晚宴枪击事件后为白宫舞厅案件进行辩护
zh.summary: 特朗普在新闻晚宴枪击事件后使用社交媒体重申白宫舞厅是国家安全问题的主张。该声明反映了关于这一事件的持续政治讨论。

title: Tillis ends block of Fed chair nominee Warsh, clears way for Trump pick
summary: Senator Tillis has lifted his opposition to Federal Reserve chair nominee Warsh, clearing the procedural path for Trump's pick to advance. This removes a key obstacle to the nominee's confirmation.

zh.title: 蒂利斯解除对美联储主席提名人沃什的阻挠，为特朗普人选扫清道路
zh.summary: 蒂利斯参议员撤回了他对美联储主席提名人沃什的反对，为特朗普的人选推进扫清了程序上的障碍。这消除了提名人确认过程中的一个关键障碍。

title: Teen gambling is turbocharged thanks to sports-betting and prediction markets. Parents often have no idea.
summary: Sports betting and prediction markets have made gambling easily accessible to teenagers, creating addiction risks that many parents don't recognize. The article explains how teens can quickly become hooked on gambling and provides guidance for parental intervention.
content: It’s ridiculously easy for kids to get hooked on gambling. Here’s how parents can help.

zh.title: 体育博彩和预测市场使青少年赌博加速发展。父母往往浑然不觉。
zh.summary: 体育博彩和预测市场使赌博容易被青少年获取，带来了许多父母未能认识到的成瘾风险。该文章解释了青少年如何迅速对赌博成瘾，并提供了父母干预的指导。

title: As mass layoffs threaten jobs, here are 4 smart moves to protect yourself
summary: With mass layoffs threatening employment security across industries, the article outlines four practical strategies workers should implement immediately. These protective measures aim to enhance job security and financial stability even for currently employed individuals.
content: Do this now, even if you have a job.

zh.title: 面对大规模裁员威胁，以下4个聪明举措可以保护你
zh.summary: 在大规模裁员威胁各行业就业安全的情况下，该文章概述了员工应立即采取的四项实用策略。这些保护措施旨在增强工作安全和财务稳定性，即使对于目前已就业的个人也是如此。

title: Planning to age in place? Watch out for these hidden costs.
summary: While most retirees prefer to age in their current homes, the article warns of substantial hidden costs that may undermine this goal. These expenses can make aging in place economically unviable for many households.
content: Most retirees want to stay in their homes as they age. It might not be worth it.

zh.title: 计划在家养老？当心这些隐性成本。
zh.summary: 虽然大多数退休人员更喜欢在现有家中养老，但该文章警告称存在可能损害这一目标的实质性隐性成本。这些费用对许多家庭来说可能使原地养老在经济上不可行。

title: I’m exactly 5 years from retirement. Here’s what I’ll do first to prepare.
summary: At age 54½, just five years from retirement, an author discusses why this represents a crucial milestone for retirement planning. This is the ideal age to begin detailed preparation for the golden years ahead.
content: I just turned 54½, and this could be my most consequential age milestone, because it’s the ideal time for me to start detailed planning for my golden years.

zh.title: 我离退休还有五年。这是我首先要做的准备。
zh.summary: 一位作者在54岁半时讨论了为什么这个时刻是退休规划的关键节点。这是开始为美好晚年进行详细准备的理想时机。

title: Retiring abroad? Watch out for this expensive housing mistake.
summary: The article cautions prospective expats to carefully evaluate housing decisions during their early retirement abroad. These early choices are crucial because certain housing mistakes can lead to significant financial consequences.
content: It’s an exhilarating time, but it’s important to be cautious during those early expat days.

zh.title: 在国外退休？要小心这个代价昂贵的住房错误。
zh.summary: 文章提醒准备移居国外的人士在国外早期退休期间要谨慎评估住房决定。这些早期选择至关重要，因为某些住房错误可能导致重大的经济损失。

title: I’ve studied over 200 kids—parents who have the closest relationships with their adult kids never do 6 things
summary: A child psychologist who studied over 200 families identifies six behaviors parents should avoid to maintain close relationships with their adult children. These insights highlight what successful parent-adult child relationships have in common.
content: Every parent hopes their adult child will still want to call, still want to come home, and still choose to let them in. Child psychologist Reem Raouda, who has studied over 200 kids, shares what not to do if you want your kids to stay close with you later on in life.

zh.title: 我研究了超过200个孩子——与成年子女关系最亲密的父母从不做6件事
zh.summary: 一位研究了200多个家庭的儿童心理学家确定了父母应该避免的六种行为，以保持与成年子女的亲密关系。这些观点揭示了成功的父母与成年子女关系的共同特点。

title: Purple ube’s viral rise is turning a Filipino staple into a global trend — but supplies are tightening
summary: Ube, a naturally sweet purple vegetable from the Philippines, has become a viral social media trend transcending its cultural origins. However, supply constraints are beginning to limit availability as global demand increases.
content: Ube, a naturally sweet, starchy vegetable grown in the Philippines, has transcended Filipino culture and become a social media sensation.

zh.title: 紫色芋头的病毒式走红将菲律宾特产变成全球趋势——但供应正在收紧
zh.summary: 一种来自菲律宾的天然甜味紫色蔬菜芋头已成为超越其文化起源的病毒式社交媒体趋势。但是，随着全球需求的增加，供应限制开始限制其可用性。

title: Insurance rates based on credit history draw scrutiny from lawmakers in some states
summary: Some state legislatures are considering bills that would prohibit insurers from using credit history to determine insurance premiums. This regulatory shift reflects growing concerns about the fairness of credit-based pricing in insurance.
content: Several state legislatures have bills pending that would prohibit insurers from using consumers' credit history to determine how much their premiums are.

zh.title: 基于信用历史的保险费率引起一些州立法者的关注
zh.summary: 一些州立法机构正在考虑禁止保险公司使用信用历史来确定保险费率的法案。这一监管转变反映了人们对保险定价中基于信用的方法公平性日益增长的担忧。

title: Top Wall Street analysts pick these 3 dividend stocks for reliable income
summary: Top Wall Street analysts recommend three well-established dividend-paying stocks for investors seeking stable passive income. These recommendations are particularly relevant for those navigating economic uncertainty.
content: Those looking for a stable stream of passive income amid uncertainty can add stocks of some well-established dividend-paying companies to their portfolios.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师精选3只股息股票实现稳定收入
zh.summary: 华尔街顶级分析师为寻求稳定被动收入的投资者精选了三只知名派息股票。这些建议对于那些在经济不确定性中寻求保护的投资者特别相关。

title: Two topics likely to come up in the first Berkshire Hathaway annual meeting without Buffett
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's first annual meeting without Warren Buffett will likely focus on share repurchases after the company resumed buybacks in March for the first time since 2024. This marks an important shift in the company's capital allocation strategy.
content: Investors are likely to zero in on share repurchases after Berkshire resumed buybacks in March for the first time since 2024.

zh.title: 伯克希尔哈撒韦首次没有巴菲特的年度股东大会可能涉及的两个议题
zh.summary: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司首次在没有沃伦·巴菲特参加的年度股东大会上，可能将重点放在股票回购上，该公司在3月恢复了自2024年以来首次的股票回购。这标志着该公司资本配置战略的重大转变。

title: Earnings playbook: Five of the 'Magnificent Seven' set to report in busiest week of season
summary: Five of the "Magnificent Seven" tech stocks, including Meta, Apple, and Amazon, are scheduled to report earnings during the busiest week of the season. These earnings reports will significantly influence market sentiment and investor confidence.
content: Meta Platforms, Apple and Amazon are among the companies set to report.

zh.title: 财报播放手册：'七大科技巨头'中的五家将在最繁忙的一周发布财报
zh.summary: 包括Meta、苹果和亚马逊在内的'七大科技巨头'中的五家计划在该季度最繁忙的一周发布财报。这些财报将显著影响市场情绪和投资者信心。

title: Big Tech is the bull market’s win-win trade right now — making this week crucial
summary: Big Tech stocks have surged in April, presenting a compelling investment opportunity amid U.S.-Iran geopolitical tensions. The sector's strong momentum makes this week particularly significant for traders and investors. Market confidence in technology companies remains robust despite broader economic uncertainties.
content: Big Tech has roared back in April. Why it could be your win-win trade during the U.S.-Iran standoff.

zh.title: 大科技股是目前牛市中的双赢交易——本周至关重要
zh.summary: 大科技股在4月份飙升，在美伊地缘政治紧张局势中呈现出引人注目的投资机会。该行业的强劲势头使本周对交易员和投资者尤为重要。尽管存在更广泛的经济不确定性，市场对科技公司的信心仍然保持强劲。

title: Higher prices could last for eight months after Iran war, minister says
summary: A government official warns that prices could remain elevated for up to eight months following a potential Iran conflict, reflecting concerns about supply chain disruptions. Authorities are actively monitoring inventory levels and developing contingency plans to mitigate economic impacts. The statement underscores the potential consumer price effects of geopolitical instability.
content: Officials are monitoring stock levels and planning for any potential disruptions to the supply chain.

zh.title: 伊朗战争后物价可能持续上涨八个月，部长表示
zh.summary: 一位政府官员警告称，在可能发生伊朗冲突后，物价可能在长达八个月内保持高位，反映了对供应链中断的担忧。当局正在积极监测库存水平，并制定应急计划以减轻经济影响。该声明强调了地缘政治不稳定性对消费者物价的潜在影响。

title: Trump: Shooter at White House press dinner had multiple weapons, one officer shot
summary: A shooting incident occurred at a White House press dinner where President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were present. The shooter was armed with multiple weapons and one officer was shot. Trump was quickly secured by Secret Service agents while attendees took cover.
content: Trump, seated next to first lady Melania Trump, was quickly surrounded by Secret Service agents, while many attendees ducked under their tables.

zh.title: 特朗普：白宫新闻晚宴枪手持多件武器，一名警官被击中
zh.summary: 白宫新闻晚宴发生枪击事件，特朗普总统和第一夫人梅拉尼亚·特朗普出席。枪手携带多件武器，一名警官被击中。特朗普迅速得到特勤局人员保护，与会者就地躲避。
